docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,976.53 FILED BY IVELI, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT MORROQUIN, BRENDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE 0.00 - SERVED JUL-30-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORROQUIN, BRENDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF THOMAS IVELI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRENDA MORROQUIN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IVELI, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORROQUIN, BRENDA $9,976.53 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,051.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 09/22/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
